channel.title: Security_researches on 0xph03n1x's Blog

item.title: Security Research To Do
item.description: Page on binary diffing based on - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8jVOvPG4TjA&ab_channel=OffByOneSecurity and https://securityintelligence.com/x-force/dissecting-exploiting-tcp-ip-rce-vulnerability-evilesp/ Exploid reversing and development
